intro: Dallas is where Pichardo's Photography calls home. From the glittering skyline of Downtown Dallas to the vibrant neighborhoods of Oak Cliff and Bishop Arts, we've photographed thousands of milestone moments across the city.

Fort Worth's rich culture and stunning venues make it a beautiful backdrop for milestone photography. From the Fort Worth Stockyards to the Cultural District, we bring our signature style to every corner of Cowtown.

Houston is one of the most diverse and vibrant cities in America — and Pichardo's Photography travels there to capture its communities' most treasured moments. From the Heights to Sugar Land, we serve all of the greater Houston area.

Austin's eclectic mix of urban energy and natural beauty provides the perfect canvas for editorial photography. We travel to Austin for quinceañeras, graduations, and portrait sessions that demand something extraordinary.
Waco's charming Magnolia Market district, Baylor University campus, and the natural beauty of the Brazos River create stunning backdrops for portrait and graduation photography.
El Paso's unique desert landscapes and rich Hispanic heritage make it a natural home for quinceañera and XV photography. We travel to El Paso for milestone events that deserve world-class imagery.

McAllen and the Rio Grande Valley have a vibrant culture of celebration. Pichardo's Photography travels to the Valley to serve families who want the very best in quinceañera, sweet 16, and event photography.
Tyler, the Rose Capital of the World, offers lush gardens and East Texas charm as the backdrop for portrait and event photography. We serve Tyler and the surrounding East Texas communities.

Galveston's historic architecture, beach scenery, and Gulf Coast energy create unforgettable photography backdrops. We shoot destination sessions and events along the island for clients who want something truly unique.
